title: Looking for Category Manager at Livspace

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Livspace
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!
